title: 2315 The Differential Wind Turbine
description:
You can find the stl files here https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6824276

you will need a differential to go with it but I have designed a few the one i used is here https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6808868 

but you could also use https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6808868 or https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6747572 or https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6744011

The last two would need a bit more working through but any will do
